info.title: Jumpseller API
info.description: Jumpseller API — light version with the 30 most common endpoints. Full spec at https://api.jumpseller.com/swagger.json

post.description: Creates a new store owned by the authenticated account. Requires a paying subscription with at least 24 hours since first payment. Limited to 5 store creations per account per day. Returns the new store API credentials.

400.description: Bad Request - invalid name or JSON body.

402.description: Payment Required - a paying subscription is required.

429.description: Too Many Requests - store creation limit exceeded (5 per day).

403.description: Forbidden - store creation is available 24 hours after first payment.

get.summary: Retrieve a Product List from a query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to query for the Product

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the fields to query for the Product

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Product Status to query for the Product

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the Category IDs to query for the Product

post.description: Category's permalink is automatically generated from the given category's name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the Category

parameters.name: status_filters[]
parameters.description: Order Status to query for the Order

parameters.name: fulfillment_filters
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the fulfillment filters to query for the Order

parameters.name: dateFilter
parameters.description: Date to query for the Order.

parameters.name: initialDate
parameters.description: Starting date to query for the Order in the format YYYY-MM-DD. CustomDate and finalDate need to be used

parameters.name: finalDate
parameters.description: Starting date to query for the Order in the format YYYY-MM-DD. CustomDate and initialDate need to be used

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the fields to query for the Order

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the Order

put.description: Only `status`, `shipment_status`, `tracking_number`, `tracking_company`, `tracking_url`, `additional_information` and `additional_fields` are available for update. An email is send if `shipment_status` changes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the Order

get.summary: Retrieve an Orders List from a query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to query for the Order

parameters.name: status_filters[]
parameters.description: Order Status to query for the Order

parameters.name: fulfillment_filters
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the fulfillment filters to query for the Order

parameters.name: dateFilter
parameters.description: Date to query for the Order.

parameters.name: initialDate
parameters.description: Starting date to query for the Order in the format YYYY-MM-DD. CustomDate and finalDate need to be used

parameters.name: finalDate
parameters.description: Starting date to query for the Order in the format YYYY-MM-DD. CustomDate and initialDate need to be used

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated values of the fields to query for the Order

count.description: Total number of orders matching the query

get.summary: Retrieve a single Customer by id.
Retrieve a Customer List from a query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to query for the Customer. If empty return all customers.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort Customers by creation date, 'asc' for ascending order or 'desc' for descending order.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: If shipping method is enabled

get.summary: Retrieve a single Page by id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the Page

OAuth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Register your app at the Jumpseller Admin Panel to get client credentials. See https://jumpseller.com/support/oauth-2/ for details.

scopes.read_products: Read products, variants, images, options, and custom fields
scopes.read_orders: Read orders, fulfillments, and order history
scopes.write_jsapps: Create, update, and delete JavaScript apps
scopes.write_store_setup: Create new stores via the store setup endpoint

login.description: API login key for the new store.

authtoken.description: API authentication token for the new store.

legal.description: True if it is a legal page

categories.description: Page categories to which the Page belongs to

location_id.description: Unique identifier of the Order Product Location

stock.description: Quantity in stock for the product at the location

id.description: Unique identifier of the Shipping Service

enabled.description: If the service is active or not

original_service_name.description: Original name of the Shipping Service

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit of the Product's Variant

stock.description: Quantity in stock for the Product's Variant

stock_unlimited.description: True if the Product's Variant has unlimited stock

stock_notification.description: True if the Product has low stock threshold quantity enabled

cost_per_item.description: Cost per item for the Product's Variant (only you can see this)

compare_at_price.description: Used to show a sale price. Value must be higher than the price

image_id.description: Unique identifier of the product image to associate with this variant

name.description: Name of the Order's Shipping Address

surname.description: Surname of the Order's Shipping Address

address.description: Address of the Order's Shipping Address

city.description: City of the Order's Shipping Address

postal.description: Postal code of the Order's Shipping Address

region.description: Region name of the Order's Shipping Address

country.description: Country name of the Order's Shipping Address

country_code.description: Country code of the Order's Shipping Address (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

region_code.description: Region code of the Order's Shipping Address (Use the FIPS standard - http://www.geonames.org/countries/)

street_number.description: Street number of the Order's Shipping Address

complement.description: Complement of the Order's Shipping Address

latitude.description: Latitude of the Order's Shipping Address

longitude.description: Longitude of the Order's Shipping Address

municipality.description: Municipality of the Order's Shipping Address

neighbourhood.description: Third level of administrative subdivision of the Customer's Shipping Address used only for some countries (e.g. Mexico)

categories.description: Page categories to which the Page belongs to

template.description: Name of the page template. Use null for the blank layout. Supports a template integer id for backward compatibility. Uses the default template if omitted.

completed_at.description: The date when the order was first completed.

subtotal.description: Subtotal value for the given Order. Excluding taxes, shipping and discounts

tax.description: Tax value for the given order

shipping_tax.description: Shipping Tax value for the given order

shipping.description: Shipping value for the given Order

shipping_required.description: False if the order is digital.

total.description: Total value for the given Order. Including taxes, shipping and discounts

discount.description: Discount value for the given Order

shipping_discount.description: Shipping Discount value for the given order

gift_cards_discount.description: Gift Cards Discount value for the given order

payment_method_name.description: Payment Method name used e.g. PayPal

payment_method_type.description: Payment Method type used e.g. paypal

payment_information.description: Payment information for the given Order

additional_information.description: Additional information for the given Order

duplicate_url.description: Duplicate Order URL for the given Order

recovery_url.description: Recovery Order URL for the given Order

review_url.description: Review Order URL for the given Order

checkout_url.description: Store Checkout Order URL for the given Order

coupons.description: Promotion Coupons used on the given Order

promotions.description: Promotions used on the given Order

additional_fields.description: Array of additional fields for the given Order

same_day_delivery.description: True if same day delivery was selected for the order, false otherwise.

shipment_status.description: Shipment Status for Order and Order Fulfillment (translated).

shipment_status_enum.description: Shipment Status for Order and Order Fulfillment (enum).

recovered_from.description: Show id of the order that was recovered from this order

external_shipping_rate_id.description: Rate id for selected External Shipping Method rate

external_shipping_rate_description.description: Rate description for selected External Shipping Method rate

maximum_quantity.description: Maximum amount of units that can be purchased per order. If present, must be bigger or equal to minimum_quantity.
